title: Diamondback: A Free Cash Flow Star
text: Even before energy prices began spiking, Diamondback Energy Inc. ( FANG , Financial) began growing its free cash flow aggressively. That growth began in the fourth quarter of 2019, when the average closing price of West Texas Intermediate was $56.99 and the high of the year was $66.24.
